src/main/java/util/Main.java.general_idea: Simplify error handling in argument parsing by removing try-catch blocks where index bounds are managed by logic.

Change public fields to private and add @Getter/@Setter annotations to enforce encapsulation.
Rename fields and logic related to 'decimal' numbers to 'float' for consistency or clarity.
Add fields to store calculated average values for integers and floats.
Replace direct System.out.println calls with a dedicated PrintUtils class and new method signatures.
Move average calculation logic into a separate method to improve modularity.

Add a default case in the switch statement to handle unknown data types.

Replaced direct field access and old method calls with new encapsulated API methods for integer statistics.
Added test for processing empty strings to verify empty string count tracking.
Added test for processing generic string input to verify shortest/longest string tracking.
Added test for processing integer input to verify sum tracking.
Added test for processing float input to verify sum tracking.
Added test for updating integer min/max/sum when initial values are null.
Added test for updating integer min/max/sum when both min and max change.
Added test for updating integer min/max/sum when values do not exceed current bounds.
Added test for verifying integer sum accumulation.
Added test for updating float min/max/sum when initial values are null.
Added test for updating float min/max/sum when both min and max change.
Added test for updating float min/max/sum when values do not exceed current bounds.
Added test for verifying float sum accumulation.
Added test for updating string min/max (length) when initial values are null.
Added test for updating string min/max (length) when both min and max change.
Added test for updating string min/max (length) when values do not exceed current bounds.
Added test for calculating average values for integers and floats with specific rounding modes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler configuration to target Java 21 using the modern 'release' flag instead of separate source/target properties.
Add Project Lombok dependency to enable annotation-based boilerplate reduction.
Remove JaCoCo Maven plugin configuration, likely due to a change in code coverage strategy or tooling.
Change project version from SNAPSHOT to a release version.
